prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Sprintex S5-2150 supercharger kit (W11 supercharger) with custom pulley setup (65mm) for the N14B16C1 (1.6L supercharged) engine, paired with a CSF high-flow intercooler and custom heat exchanger to maintain intake temps below 45°C under full boost (1.2 bar peak).

Full forged internals by Mahle Motorsport: forged pistons (86.5mm, 9.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings, supporting 300+ WHP on 98 RON fuel with a custom ECU remap via a Dimsport Genius Pro standalone (OEM Siemens MS45.1 ECU bypassed).

Exhaust system: custom 3-inch turbo-back setup by Scorpion, featuring 409 stainless steel mandrel-bent piping, a 300-cell GESI catalytic converter, and a titanium-wrapped Borla S-Type rear silencer, reducing backpressure by 40% while maintaining OEM-like NVH for daily driving.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (R53-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and duckbill rear wing, paired with OEM+ color-matched LCI-style headlights (depo Racing) and smoked LED taillights (Lux H8).

BC Racing BR Type ER coilovers (R53-specific valving) with Swift Springs (8kg/mm front, 7kg/mm rear) and polybushings (SuperPro) for subframe reinforcement, lowering ride height to 120mm front/125mm rear with adjustable camber plates (Camberplates UK).

Engine bay aesthetics: custom carbon fiber intake manifold cover (Seibon), M7 Speed carbon fiber strut brace, and a relocated battery setup (Braille Battery G27) to the trunk for 50/50 weight distribution, paired with a custom aluminum radiator support (Custom Cages).
